title: Refund policy
text: Customers can request a refund within 30 days if the product is unused and the receipt is available.

title: Enterprise support
text: Enterprise customers receive priority support, a dedicated success manager, and quarterly business reviews.

title: Security posture
text: The platform supports role-based access control, audit logs, encryption in transit, and encryption at rest.

title: Data retention
text: Workspace logs are retained for 90 days by default. Enterprise admins may configure a longer retention window.
